calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Nov-30-2009 Assigned To Trial Court

SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Nov-30-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from the Presiding Judge Dept. 206 for Court Trial/Settlement Conference. Commissioner: William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, Reporter: Lois Jones, CSR #3689.

Andrew Ford, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Atlantic & Finance, Inc.
Defendant Denis A. Galo was present in pro per, placed under oath and examined.
Notice of Time & Place of Trial was filed on August 12, 2009.

Settlement agreement reached by the parties was placed on the record by Mr. Ford. In accordance with the terms of said agreement, commencing on December 28, 2009, and continuing on the 28th day of each month thereafter, defendant Denis A. Galo shall pay plaintiff Atlantic Credit & Finance, Inc. the sum of ten ($10.00) dollars per month until the balance of $1,600.00 is paid in full. No interest shall accrue.

Mr. Galo was voir dired by the Court as to the terms and his understanding of the agreement.

This agreement shall be reduced to writing by Mr. Ford. Agreement of the parties was accepted by the Court. Parties agree to reassess this agreement in May, 2010.

Matter is continued to January 18, 2023 @ 10:00 on the CRC 3.1386 Dismissal Calendar in Department 212.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-12-2009 Set For Trial On Nov-30-09 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206
